title: pelargonium antidysentericum subsp. antidysentericum
intro: Pelargonium antidysentericum subsp. antidysentericum, commonly known as the Cape chamomile, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, and is also known for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium antidysentericum subsp. antidysentericum include soothing digestive issues, reducing stress and anxiety, and promoting relaxation, making it a popular herbal remedy for calming the nervous system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to relieve symptoms of indigestion, insomnia, and other conditions.
